bird.name: 刚果原燕
bird.summary: 剛果原燕（学名：Phedinopsis brazzae），也称为布氏原燕，是雀形目燕科刚果原燕属（学名：Phedinopsis）的一种鸟类。 剛果原燕体重约13克，翼长约99.8毫米，嘴峰长约9.2毫米，喙宽度约3.4毫米，喙厚度约2.5毫米，跗蹠长约11.1毫米，尾长约50.…

locations.name: Hans Edmund Wolters
locations.summary: Hans Edmund Wolters (11 February 1915 – 22 December 1991) was a German ornithologist from Duisburg.

relations.subject: 刚果原燕
relations.evidence: Brazza's martin (Phedinopsis brazzae) is a passerine bird in the swallow family, Hirundinidae

relations.subject: 刚果原燕
relations.evidence: There may be some hunting of this martin for food, but the species does not appear to be facing any serious short-term threats
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
